Name: Elapsed time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the completion of the initial reviewer invitation phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time until SW-Initial Reviewer Selection since the manuscript passed the Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: SW-Initial Reviewer Selection Cycle Time within the ACM journal review process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: Average time difference between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection duration and SW-Checklist Completed duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time difference between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection duration and SW-AE Assign Reviewers duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Ratio of average time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to average time for SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time difference between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time difference between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and Manuscript Export Succeeded in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to the average time of all activities in the review process variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the end of the case

Name: Average time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection grouped by case outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"

Name: Time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the start of the major revision phase (SW–Major Revision due in 1 month)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'", 'aggregation': 'average'}"
